description: Map that emits H3 cell at center.

param.description: Canvas parameter for the H3 cell string

paramType.description: Emit the H3 cell as a hex string ("string") or as a BigInt number ("int").

h3Res.description: Fixed H3 resolution (0-15). If omitted, resolution is auto-derived from the map zoom level.

resOffset.description: Offset added to the auto-derived resolution. Positive = smaller hexes, negative = bigger hexes.

hexOpacity.description: Hex fill opacity. 0 = transparent, 1 = solid. Default 0.03 for a very slight fill.

showDetails.description: Show hex ID and resolution overlay on the map.

showBasemapSwitcher.description: Show Dark / Light / Satellite basemap toggle on the map.

sendOnMove.description: When true and autoSend is true, emit when the hex changes while dragging/zooming (debounce defaults to 0). When false, emit only when movement ends.

maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level. If omitted and h3Res is set, defaults to the zoom ceiling for that resolution so the user cannot zoom past the hex size.

minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level. Prevents zooming out beyond this level.

latParam.description: Canvas parameter name to emit the center latitude.

lngParam.description: Canvas parameter name to emit the center longitude.

resParam.description: Canvas parameter name to emit the current H3 resolution.

zoomParam.description: Canvas parameter name to emit the current zoom level.

boundsParam.description: Canvas parameter name to emit the viewport bounds as "west,south,east,north".

kRing.description: K-ring radius around the center hex. 0 = center only. 1-6 = include surrounding rings.

kRingParam.description: Canvas parameter name to emit a JSON array of all hex IDs in the k-ring (includes center).

showSearch.description: Show a geocoder search bar overlay on the map.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string

propsSchema.description: Interactive map that emits the H3 hex cell at the map center. Resolution can be fixed or auto-derived from zoom.
